summary: Fabric v1.0 产品化落地计划 — 11 项任务分 Wave A/B/C 三波推进. Wave A (TASK-001~004) 清除 npm publish 阻塞项: roadmap 重写、@fabric scope 统一、构建时版本注入、文档入口重构. Wave B (TASK-005~008) 建设共享基础设施: shared 类型/i18n 骨架、CLI 语义色模块、AI 提示词 core/wrapper 重构、CLI+Dashboard i18n 接入. Wave C (TASK-009~011) 完成首发收尾: CI/发布基础设施、launch story 三幕分发、品牌资产最小包.
approach: 依赖图驱动的三波顺序发布. Wave A 四任务: TASK-001 和 TASK-004 独立并行; TASK-002 (scope+version) 是 TASK-003/005/006 的前置. Wave B 建设于 Wave A 之上: TASK-005 (shared) → TASK-007 (protected-tokens) 和 TASK-008 (i18n 接入); TASK-006 (CLI colors) → TASK-008 (避免 commands/*.ts 冲突). Wave C 在 Wave B 完成后: TASK-009 (CI) 需要 i18n-lint 已存在; TASK-010/011 需要文档结构已建立. 严格遵守 handoff-spec 锁定决策: @fabric scope, 版本 1.0.0, Dashboard 归 v1.1, en 默认 locale, AI prompt core/wrapper 策略.
estimated_time: 8-12 工作日 (Wave A: 2-3天, Wave B: 4-5天, Wave C: 2-3天)

design_decisions.rationale: 锁定决策 — 消除 @fabric vs @fabric 混用, 单一公开 scope
design_decisions.tradeoff: 需要重建 pnpm-lock.yaml; 无 npm rename 能力, 首次发布即正确

design_decisions.decision: build-time version injection via define: {} pattern
design_decisions.rationale: 复用 CLI 已验证的 __CLI_VERSION__ 模式; 零运行时开销; package.json 为单一版本来源
design_decisions.tradeoff: 需要 vite.config 和 tsup.config 各自添加 import pkg from './package.json'

design_decisions.decision: i18n 基础设施放在 packages/shared
design_decisions.rationale: CLI (Node) 和 Dashboard (Browser) 共享 createTranslator / detectNodeLocale 避免代码重复; shared 包已有 workspace 依赖路径
design_decisions.tradeoff: shared 包变为实质性依赖, 需保持 build 顺序正确 (shared first)

design_decisions.decision: AI 提示词策略: core (英文硬规则) + wrapper (中文解释)
design_decisions.rationale: 研究证实英文硬规则 +10-15% AI 代码质量; 中文 wrapper 对中国开发者保留可读性
design_decisions.tradeoff: 单文件 core/wrapper 需要 lint 脚本防止 AI 翻译 core section

design_decisions.decision: Dashboard 归 v1.1 Feature #5 (锁定决策)
design_decisions.rationale: Dashboard 已完整实现但在 roadmap 中未体现; v1.0 = Control Plane MVP, v1.1 引入 Observable Maintenance
design_decisions.tradeoff: 需要移除 app.tsx 中的 v1.1 硬编版本, 替换为动态注入

design_decisions.decision: 默认 locale = en, zh-CN 一等公民 (锁定决策)
design_decisions.rationale: 国际化 npm 包; LANG/FAB_LANG 检测; zh-CN 双语 snapshot 测试保证质量
design_decisions.tradeoff: 需要同步维护 en.ts 和 zh-CN.ts 两个 locale 文件

data_flow.diagram: Wave A: TASK-001 + TASK-004 (独立) → TASK-002 (scope) → TASK-003 + TASK-005 + TASK-006 | Wave B: TASK-005 → TASK-007; TASK-005 + TASK-006 → TASK-008 | Wave C: TASK-002 + TASK-008 → TASK-009; TASK-001 + TASK-004 → TASK-010; TASK-004 → TASK-011

stages.input: Current repo state with version/scope inconsistencies
stages.output: Unified @fabric scope + 1.0.0 version + corrected docs entry

stages.input: Clean scope + version foundation from Wave A
stages.output: Shared types + i18n infrastructure + CLI colors + AI prompt strategy + i18n wiring

stages.input: Full infrastructure from Wave B + docs structure from Wave A
stages.output: Release pipeline + launch story docs + brand assets

conventions: AI prompt: core (English hard rules) + wrapper (Chinese explanation)
build-time version injection via define pattern

dimensions.completeness: PASS — all 11 implementation_scope items mapped to tasks
dimensions.granularity: PASS — tasks range 30-120 min each, TASK-005/008 are large but justified by scope
dimensions.dependencies: PASS — no circular deps; TASK-008 depends_on both TASK-005 and TASK-006 (merge_fork strategy)
dimensions.convergence_criteria: PASS — all convergence criteria are quantified (grep return counts, file existence, build exit codes)
dimensions.implementation_steps: PASS — all tasks have >= 5 implementation steps
dimensions.constraint_compliance: PASS — all locked decisions observed: @fabric scope, 1.0.0, en default, core/wrapper AI prompts, Dashboard=v1.1
